Terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions governing access to the SafeBox website and enquiries about SafeBox services.
Terms.title: Terms & Conditions

about.title: 1. About These Terms
paragraphs: These Terms & Conditions govern your access to and use of the SafeBox website. By using this website, you agree to these terms.

websiteInformation.title: 3. Website Information
paragraphs: The information presented on this website is provided for general informational and promotional purposes. It describes SafeBox services, memberships and optional additional services.
Website content does not itself constitute a binding service agreement, reservation or guarantee of availability.

membershipEnquiries.title: 4. Membership Enquiries
paragraphs: Submitting an enquiry or selecting a membership on this website does not automatically create a subscription or contractual relationship.
A membership becomes effective only after customer identification, confirmation of availability, acceptance of the applicable service agreement and completion of any required payment.

prices.title: 5. Prices and Availability
paragraphs: Prices displayed on the website may be updated. Applicable taxes, delivery charges, forwarding costs and additional service charges will be communicated before the customer enters into a binding agreement.
Memberships, SafeBox sizes and additional services remain subject to availability.

permittedUse.title: 6. Permitted Use
paragraphs: Users must not misuse this website, attempt to gain unauthorised access, interfere with its operation, submit false information or use the website for unlawful purposes.

prohibitedItems.title: 7. Prohibited Items
paragraphs: SafeBox services must not be used for illegal goods, dangerous items, hazardous materials, weapons, prohibited cash, perishable goods or any item restricted by law or by the applicable service agreement.
The definitive list of accepted and prohibited items will be stated in the customer service agreement.

intellectualProperty.title: 8. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: The SafeBox name, logo, visual identity, website design, text, graphics and other website content are protected by applicable intellectual-property laws.
They may not be copied, distributed, reproduced or used for commercial purposes without prior written permission.

thirdPartyServices.title: 9. Third-Party Services
paragraphs: The website may use or link to third-party services, including form-processing, hosting, analytics, mapping, calendar or payment providers. Those services may be governed by their own terms and privacy policies.

availability.title: 10. Website Availability
paragraphs: We aim to keep the website accurate and available, but we do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or that all information will always be free from errors.
We may modify, suspend or withdraw website content when reasonably necessary.

liability.title: 11. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: To the maximum extent permitted by law, the website operator is not responsible for indirect loss resulting solely from use of, or inability to access, this informational website.
Nothing in these terms excludes liability that cannot legally be excluded or limits mandatory consumer rights.

privacy.title: 12. Privacy
privacy.beforeLink: Personal information submitted through the website is handled in accordance with our

law.title: 13. Applicable Law
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Spanish law, without prejudice to any mandatory rights or jurisdiction available to consumers under applicable law.

contact.title: 14. Contact
contact.text: Questions regarding these Terms & Conditions may be sent through the contact form on the SafeBox website.
